title: Axios C-Suite: Your agent prep kit
full_text: More than half of my exec team has already built personal chief-of-staff AI agents — connected to email, to-do lists, goals and meetings. They didn't wait for an IT rollout. They just built them. Why it matters: The first-mover advantage in this age of asymmetry is structural, not incremental. Leade
